name: hcl-playground
description: Evaluate HCL expressions in the browser with Terraform or OpenTofu — version-aware autocomplete and docs, any version on demand, no install or init/console loop.

name: DUCKODUCKO 🦆
description: A whimsical top-down, tap-to-hop duck roguelike. Play it instantly in the browser, or grab the Android APK from Releases

name: bird-photography-pipeline
description: A one-screen pipeline for my bird photography: Synology → Lightroom → Buffer → Instagram. Import, auto-tone, denoise, pick, export, then caption, resize, and schedule the keepers.

name: Website
tech: Flask · Zappa · AWS Lambda · S3 · d3
description: This site, including a living gallery of the Birds of North Andover that syncs itself from Instagram daily, re-hosts every photo to S3, and turns the archive into maps, phenology charts, and a life list.

name: google-photos-archiver
description: A simple, fast, extensible tool to back up Google Photos to a destination of your choosing.

name: grip-tracker
description: A modded grip tracker that funnels data to Grafana
